trigger.author: zoe
trigger.content: Hey <@1494822530643398827> I need the codex-tpm in the Multica `sonste` project to be able to notify me via Discord using cc-connect to the channel `1507166911648239686`. Is this something you can help me with, or should I reach out through a different platform? (this could be a great test to see if the rest will stay silent or butt in :))
